query:
INSERT INTO quiz_answers (questionId, answerText, answerTextSwahili, isCorrect, `order`) VALUES
-- Lesson 1, Question 1
(1, 'God had a beginning but will never end', 'Mungu alikuwa na mwanzo lakini hatakamatia', 0, 1),
(1, 'God has always existed and will always exist', 'Mungu daima alikuwepo na atakuwepo daima', 1, 2),
(1, 'God exists only in the present moment', 'Mungu anaishi tu katika sasa', 0, 3),
(1, 'God''s existence depends on creation', 'Uwepo wa Mungu unategemea uumbaji', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 1, Question 2
(2, 'God knows everything about everyone', 'Mungu anajua kila kitu kuhusu kila mtu', 0, 1),
(2, 'God is present everywhere at all times', 'Mungu yupo mahali popote kila wakati', 0, 2),
(2, 'God has all power and can do anything', 'Mungu ana nguvu zote na anaweza kufanya kitu chochote', 1, 3),
(2, 'God is perfectly just and fair', 'Mungu ni haki na adilifu kabisa', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 1, Question 3
(3, 'One person only', 'Mtu mmoja tu', 0, 1),
(3, 'Two persons', 'Watu wawili', 0, 2),
(3, 'Three persons', 'Watu watatu', 1, 3),
(3, 'Many persons', 'Watu wengi', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 1, Question 4
(4, 'Omniscience', 'Ujuzi wa kila kitu', 0, 1),
(4, 'Holiness', 'Utakatifu', 1, 2),
(4, 'Eternity', 'Milele', 0, 3),
(4, 'Omnipresence', 'Kuwepo mahali popote', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 1, Question 5
(5, 'It helps us pass theological exams', 'Inasaidia kupitia mitihani ya teolojia', 0, 1),
(5, 'It changes how we worship, trust, and serve God', 'Inabadilisha jinsi tunavyoabudu, kuamini, na kuhudumiakwa Mungu', 1, 2),
(5, 'It is required by the church but not practical', 'Inahitajika na kanisa lakini si ya vitendo', 0, 3),
(5, 'It has no real impact on our faith', 'Haina athari halisi kwa imani yetu', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 1, Question 6
(6, 'God knows some things but not everything', 'Mungu anajua baadhi ya mambo lakini si kila kitu', 0, 1),
(6, 'God knows all things past, present, and future', 'Mungu anajua kila kitu: zamani, sasa, na baadaye', 1, 2),
(6, 'God only knows what happens in the present', 'Mungu anajua tu kile kinachotokea sasa', 0, 3),
(6, 'God''s knowledge is limited like human knowledge', 'Ujuzi wa Mungu unafungwa kama ujuzi wa binadamu', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 2, Question 7
(7, 'Jesus came to make us rich and healthy', 'Yesu akaja kututengeneza tajiri na wenye afya', 0, 1),
(7, 'Jesus came to teach philosophy and wisdom', 'Yesu akaja kufundisha falsafa na hekima', 0, 2),
(7, 'Jesus came to die for our sins and offer salvation', 'Yesu akaja kufa kwa ajili ya dhambi zetu na kutupa kuokoa', 1, 3),
(7, 'Jesus came to establish a political kingdom', 'Yesu akaja kuanzisha ufalme wa kisiasa', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 2, Question 8
(8, 'Jesus is a created being like angels', 'Yesu ni kiumbe kilichoumbwa kama malaika', 0, 1),
(8, 'Jesus is fully God and fully human, the second person of the Trinity', 'Yesu ni Mungu kamili na mtu kamili, mtu wa pili wa Utatu', 1, 2),
(8, 'Jesus is a great prophet but not divine', 'Yesu ni nabii mkubwa lakini si mungu', 0, 3),
(8, 'Jesus is God''s adopted child', 'Yesu ni mtoto wa Mungu aliyekubaliwa', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 2, Question 9
(9, 'It proves Jesus was a good teacher', 'Inathibitisha kwamba Yesu alikuwa mwalimu mzuri', 0, 1),
(9, 'It proves Jesus is God and offers hope for eternal life', 'Inathibitisha kwamba Yesu ni Mungu na inatupa tumaini la maisha ya milele', 1, 2),
(9, 'It is a symbolic story with no historical basis', 'Ni hadithi ya ishara tu bila msingi wa kihistoria', 0, 3),
(9, 'It only matters for Christian holidays', 'Inamaanisha tu kwa likizo za Kikristo', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 2, Question 10
(10, 'Jesus taught us to substitute good works for faith', 'Yesu alitualimu kusubstitute kazi nzuri kwa imani', 0, 1),
(10, 'Jesus took our place and bore the punishment for our sins', 'Yesu akachukua mahali petu na akabeba adhabu ya dhambi zetu', 1, 2),
(10, 'Jesus substituted the Old Testament with the New Testament', 'Yesu akabadilisha Agano la Kale na Agano Jipya', 0, 3),
(10, 'Jesus asked us to substitute our money for salvation', 'Yesu aliuliza tusubstitute pesa zetu kwa kuokoa', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 2, Question 11
(11, 'Because He is the most popular religion', 'Kwa sababu yeye ni dini maadhimika zaidi', 0, 1),
(11, 'Because salvation comes only through faith in His death and resurrection', 'Kwa sababu kuokoa kunakuja tu kupitia imani katika kifo na ufufuko wake', 1, 2),
(11, 'Because other religions are not allowed', 'Kwa sababu dini nyingine haziruhusiwi', 0, 3),
(11, 'Because Jesus was the first person to teach about God', 'Kwa sababu Yesu alikuwa mtu wa kwanza kufundisha kuhusu Mungu', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 2, Question 12
(12, 'Jesus will return physically to judge the living and the dead', 'Yesu atarudi kimwili kukamatia wahai na wafu', 1, 1),
(12, 'Jesus is already here in spirit only', 'Yesu yupo hapa katika roho tu', 0, 2),
(12, 'Jesus will never return to earth', 'Yesu hatakamatia duniani', 0, 3),
(12, 'Jesus will return as a different person', 'Yesu atarudi kama mtu tofauti', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 3, Question 13
(13, 'The Holy Spirit forces people to become Christians', 'Roho Mtakatifu inakuza watu kuwa Wakristo', 0, 1),
(13, 'The Holy Spirit convicts people of sin and draws them to Jesus', 'Roho Mtakatifu inakamatia dhambi na inatuvuta kwa Yesu', 1, 2),
(13, 'The Holy Spirit has no role in conversion', 'Roho Mtakatifu haina jukumu katika ubadilishaji', 0, 3),
(13, 'The Holy Spirit only works after someone becomes a Christian', 'Roho Mtakatifu inafanya kazi tu baada ya kuwa Mkristo', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 3, Question 14
(14, 'The Holy Spirit lives outside of us and watches from a distance', 'Roho Mtakatifu inaishi nje yetu na inatazama kutoka mbali', 0, 1),
(14, 'The Holy Spirit lives within us and empowers us for holy living', 'Roho Mtakatifu inaishi ndani yetu na inatupa nguvu kwa maisha takatifu', 1, 2),
(14, 'The Holy Spirit only visits us occasionally', 'Roho Mtakatifu inakuja kwa sisi mara kwa mara', 0, 3),
(14, 'The Holy Spirit is a force, not a person', 'Roho Mtakatifu ni nguvu, si mtu', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 3, Question 15
(15, 'Expensive presents we give to God', 'Zawadi ghali tunazompatia Mungu', 0, 1),
(15, 'Supernatural abilities given by the Holy Spirit to serve others', 'Uwezo wa kiroho uliotolewa na Roho Mtakatifu kuhudumiakwa wengine', 1, 2),
(15, 'Special talents we develop through practice', 'Talanta maalum tunazoeneza kupitia mazoezi', 0, 3),
(15, 'Privileges only for pastors and missionaries', 'Haki maalum tu kwa wapadri na mitume', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 3, Question 16
(16, 'Material blessings and wealth', 'Baraka za nyenzo na mali', 0, 1),
(16, 'Love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness, gentleness, and self-control', 'Upendo, furaha, amani, subira, wema, uzuri, uaminifu, upole, na kujizuia', 1, 2),
(16, 'Supernatural powers and miracles', 'Nguvu za kiroho na miujiza', 0, 3),
(16, 'Emotional experiences and feelings', 'Heshima za kihemko na hisia', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 3, Question 17
(17, 'The Holy Spirit forces us to be perfect immediately', 'Roho Mtakatifu inatukuza tuwe kamili haraka', 0, 1),
(17, 'The Holy Spirit gradually transforms us through sanctification', 'Roho Mtakatifu inabadilisha polepole kupitia kuwa takatifu', 1, 2),
(17, 'The Holy Spirit has no role in our spiritual growth', 'Roho Mtakatifu haina jukumu katika ukuaji wetu wa kiroho', 0, 3),
(17, 'We become like Jesus through our own effort and willpower', 'Tunakamatia kama Yesu kupitia juhudi zetu na nguvu ya nia', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 3, Question 18
(18, 'The Holy Spirit inspired the writing of the Bible', 'Roho Mtakatifu ilieneza kuandika Biblia', 0, 1),
(18, 'The Holy Spirit helps us understand and apply Scripture', 'Roho Mtakatifu inasaidia tuelewe na kutumia Maandiko', 0, 2),
(18, 'Both A and B', 'Zote A na B', 1, 3),
(18, 'The Holy Spirit and the Bible are separate and unrelated', 'Roho Mtakatifu na Biblia hazina uhusiano', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 4, Question 19
(19, 'Poverty and lack of education', 'Umaskini na ukosefu wa elimu', 0, 1),
(19, 'Sin - breaking God''s law and rebelling against Him', 'Dhambi - kuvunja sheria ya Mungu na kuasi Mungu', 1, 2),
(19, 'Bad luck and misfortune', 'Bahati mbaya na matatizo', 0, 3),
(19, 'We don''t actually need salvation', 'Hatuhitaji kuokoa', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 4, Question 20
(20, 'Yes, if we do enough good deeds', 'Ndiyo, kama tunafanya kazi nzuri sana', 0, 1),
(20, 'Yes, if we are good enough', 'Ndiyo, kama tunavyo nzuri sana', 0, 2),
(20, 'No, salvation is a gift of grace received through faith in Jesus', 'Hapana, kuokoa ni zawadi ya neema iliyopokelewa kupitia imani katika Yesu', 1, 3),
(20, 'Maybe, it depends on how good we are', 'Labda, inategemea jinsi tunavyo nzuri', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 4, Question 21
(21, 'Feeling sorry about our sins', 'Kuona aibu kuhusu dhambi zetu', 0, 1),
(21, 'Turning away from sin and turning toward God', 'Kugeuka kutoka dhambi na kugeuka kwa Mungu', 1, 2),
(21, 'Confessing our sins to a priest', 'Kuungama dhambi zetu kwa kuhani', 0, 3),
(21, 'Promising never to sin again', 'Kuahidi kutokukataa tena', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 4, Question 22
(22, 'Just intellectual belief in facts about Jesus', 'Kuamini tu kwa akili kuhusu mambo kuhusu Yesu', 0, 1),
(22, 'Trusting and committing your life to Jesus as Lord and Savior', 'Kuamini na kujitolea maisha yako kwa Yesu kama Bwana na Mwokozi', 1, 2),
(22, 'Blind belief without any evidence', 'Kuamini bila ushahidi', 0, 3),
(22, 'Following religious rules and traditions', 'Kufuata sheria za kidini na mila', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 4, Question 23
(23, 'God punishes us for our sins', 'Mungu anatuhukumu kwa dhambi zetu', 0, 1),
(23, 'God declares us righteous and forgives our sins through faith in Jesus', 'Mungu anatuangalia kuwa haki na kutusamehe dhambi zetu kupitia imani katika Yesu', 1, 2),
(23, 'We become perfect and never sin again', 'Tunakamatia kamili na hatukataai tena', 0, 3),
(23, 'God ignores our sins without forgiving them', 'Mungu inapuuza dhambi zetu bila kutusamehe', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 4, Question 24
(24, 'We can never be sure if we are saved', 'Hatuwezi kuwa na hakika kama tumeokoa', 0, 1),
(24, 'We know we are saved based on our feelings', 'Tunajua tumeokoa kulingana na heshima zetu', 0, 2),
(24, 'We know we are saved because of God''s promise and the work of the Holy Spirit', 'Tunajua tumeokoa kwa sababu ya ahadi ya Mungu na kazi ya Roho Mtakatifu', 1, 3),
(24, 'Only special people can have assurance of salvation', 'Watu maalum tu wanaweza kuwa na hakika ya kuokoa', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 5, Question 25
(25, 'A building where Christians meet', 'Jengo ambapo Wakristo wanakutana', 0, 1),
(25, 'An organization run by priests', 'Shirika linaloongozwa na wapadri', 0, 2),
(25, 'The body of Christ - all people who believe in Jesus', 'Mwili wa Kristo - watu wote wanaoamini Yesu', 1, 3),
(25, 'A club for religious people', 'Klabu kwa watu wa kidini', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 5, Question 26
(26, 'Jesus'' physical body is the church', 'Mwili wa kimwili wa Yesu ni kanisa', 0, 1),
(26, 'The Church is just a metaphor with no real meaning', 'Kanisa ni kimetafora tu bila maana halisi', 0, 2),
(26, 'Jesus is the head and believers are members working together for His purpose', 'Yesu ni kichwa na waumini ni wanachama wanafanya kazi pamoja kwa kusudi lake', 1, 3),
(26, 'The Church is separate from Jesus', 'Kanisa ni tofauti na Yesu', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 5, Question 27
(27, 'To build impressive buildings', 'Kujenga majengo ya ajabu', 0, 1),
(27, 'To make money and become wealthy', 'Kufanya pesa na kuwa tajiri', 0, 2),
(27, 'To share the Gospel and make disciples of all nations', 'Kushiriki Injili na kufanya wanafunzi wa mataifa yote', 1, 3),
(27, 'To maintain religious traditions', 'Kuendelea na mila za kidini', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 5, Question 28
(28, 'Baptism and Communion', 'Ubatizo na Chakula cha Bwana', 1, 1),
(28, 'Confession and Penance', 'Kuungama na Adhabu', 0, 2),
(28, 'Marriage and Ordination', 'Ndoa na Kumheshimu', 0, 3),
(28, 'Anointing and Blessing', 'Kumweka mafuta na Kubariki', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 5, Question 29
(29, 'Joining a club or organization', 'Kujiunga na klabu au shirika', 0, 1),
(29, 'Our faith in Jesus and our commitment to follow Him', 'Imani yetu katika Yesu na kujitolea kufuata yeye', 1, 2),
(29, 'Washing away our sins through water', 'Kuosha dhambi zetu kupitia maji', 0, 3),
(29, 'Becoming a member of a specific church building', 'Kuwa mwanachama wa jengo maalum la kanisa', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 5, Question 30
(30, 'Exclude them to maintain purity', 'Kuwatenga ili kuendelea na taharaka', 0, 1),
(30, 'Welcome them and help them feel part of God''s family', 'Kuwakaribishia na kusaidia wakamatia sehemu ya familia ya Mungu', 1, 2),
(30, 'Make them abandon their culture to fit in', 'Kuwafanya waache utamaduni wao ili kufaa', 0, 3),
(30, 'Treat them as outsiders', 'Kuwakamata kama wageni', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 6, Question 31
(31, 'No, heaven is just a metaphor', 'Hapana, mbingu ni kimetafora tu', 0, 1),
(31, 'Yes, heaven is real - God''s presence and eternal joy', 'Ndiyo, mbingu ni halisi - uwepo wa Mungu na furaha ya milele', 1, 2),
(31, 'Maybe, we can''t know for sure', 'Labda, hatuwezi kuwa na hakika', 0, 3),
(31, 'Yes, but only for special people', 'Ndiyo, lakini tu kwa watu maalum', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 6, Question 32
(32, 'A temporary place of punishment', 'Mahali pa adhabu ya muda', 0, 1),
(32, 'Separation from God''s presence and eternal suffering', 'Kusambazwa na uwepo wa Mungu na uchafuzi wa milele', 1, 2),
(32, 'A myth created to scare people', 'Hadithi iliyoumbwa kuogopa watu', 0, 3),
(32, 'A place where God punishes only the worst sinners', 'Mahali Mungu anatohukumu wanakataa tu', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 6, Question 33
(33, 'God is cruel and enjoys punishing people', 'Mungu ni mwenye hasira na anajifurahia kuhukumu watu', 0, 1),
(33, 'God is not real because a good God wouldn''t create hell', 'Mungu si halisi kwa sababu Mungu mzuri hakuunda jehanamu', 0, 2),
(33, 'God takes sin seriously and respects human free will to reject Him', 'Mungu anachukua dhambi kwa uzani na anaheshimu chaguo la binadamu kumkataa', 1, 3),
(33, 'Hell is not mentioned in Jesus'' teachings', 'Yesu hafundishi kuhusu jehanamu', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 6, Question 34
(34, 'We know the exact date and time', 'Tunajua tarehe na saa halisi', 0, 1),
(34, 'Jesus will return, but no one knows the day or hour', 'Yesu atarudi, lakini hakuna mtu anajua siku wala saa', 1, 2),
(34, 'Jesus will never return', 'Yesu hatakamatia', 0, 3),
(34, 'Jesus has already returned', 'Yesu amefanya kurudi tayari', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 6, Question 35
(35, 'Live however we want since we can''t know for sure', 'Kuishi jinsi tunavyotaka kwa sababu hatuwezi kuwa na hakika', 0, 1),
(35, 'Share the Gospel urgently so people can be saved', 'Kushiriki Injili kwa haraka ili watu wakamatia', 1, 2),
(35, 'Fear God but not love Him', 'Kuogopa Mungu lakini kumsifu', 0, 3),
(35, 'Focus only on earthly pleasures', 'Kuzingatia tu furaha za duniani', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 6, Question 36
(36, 'We hope to escape earth and go to heaven', 'Tunatumainiana kukamatia duniani na kwenda mbinguni', 0, 1),
(36, 'We hope in Jesus'' promise of eternal life with God and His people', 'Tunatumainiana katika ahadi ya Yesu ya maisha ya milele na Mungu na watu wake', 1, 2),
(36, 'We have no hope because death is the end', 'Hatuna tumaini kwa sababu kifo ni mwisho', 0, 3),
(36, 'We hope to be reincarnated in a better life', 'Tunatumainiana kukamatia tena katika maisha mazuri', 0, 4);

(11, 'Because Jesus was the first person to teach about God', 'Kwa sababu Yesu alikuwa mtu wa kwanza kufundisha kuhusu Mungu', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 2, Question 12
(12, 'Jesus will return physically to judge the living and the dead', 'Yesu atarudi kimwili kukamatia wahai na wafu', 1, 1),
(12, 'Jesus is already here in spirit only', 'Yesu yupo hapa katika roho tu', 0, 2),
(12, 'Jesus will never return to earth', 'Yesu hatakamatia duniani', 0, 3),
(12, 'Jesus will return as a different person', 'Yesu atarudi kama mtu tofauti', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 3, Question 13
(13, 'The Holy Spirit forces people to become Christians', 'Roho Mtakatifu inakuza watu kuwa Wakristo', 0, 1),
(13, 'The Holy Spirit convicts people of sin and draws them to Jesus', 'Roho Mtakatifu inakamatia dhambi na inatuvuta kwa Yesu', 1, 2),
(13, 'The Holy Spirit has no role in conversion', 'Roho Mtakatifu haina jukumu katika ubadilishaji', 0, 3),
(13, 'The Holy Spirit only works after someone becomes a Christian', 'Roho Mtakatifu inafanya kazi tu baada ya kuwa Mkristo', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 3, Question 14
(14, 'The Holy Spirit lives outside of us and watches from a distance', 'Roho Mtakatifu inaishi nje yetu na inatazama kutoka mbali', 0, 1),
(14, 'The Holy Spirit lives within us and empowers us for holy living', 'Roho Mtakatifu inaishi ndani yetu na inatupa nguvu kwa maisha takatifu', 1, 2),
(14, 'The Holy Spirit only visits us occasionally', 'Roho Mtakatifu inakuja kwa sisi mara kwa mara', 0, 3),
(14, 'The Holy Spirit is a force, not a person', 'Roho Mtakatifu ni nguvu, si mtu', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 3, Question 15
(15, 'Expensive presents we give to God', 'Zawadi ghali tunazompatia Mungu', 0, 1),
(15, 'Supernatural abilities given by the Holy Spirit to serve others', 'Uwezo wa kiroho uliotolewa na Roho Mtakatifu kuhudumiakwa wengine', 1, 2),
(15, 'Special talents we develop through practice', 'Talanta maalum tunazoeneza kupitia mazoezi', 0, 3),
(15, 'Privileges only for pastors and missionaries', 'Haki maalum tu kwa wapadri na mitume', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 3, Question 16
(16, 'Material blessings and wealth', 'Baraka za nyenzo na mali', 0, 1),
(16, 'Love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness, gentleness, and self-control', 'Upendo, furaha, amani, subira, wema, uzuri, uaminifu, upole, na kujizuia', 1, 2),
(16, 'Supernatural powers and miracles', 'Nguvu za kiroho na miujiza', 0, 3),
(16, 'Emotional experiences and feelings', 'Heshima za kihemko na hisia', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 3, Question 17
(17, 'The Holy Spirit forces us to be perfect immediately', 'Roho Mtakatifu inatukuza tuwe kamili haraka', 0, 1),
(17, 'The Holy Spirit gradually transforms us through sanctification', 'Roho Mtakatifu inabadilisha polepole kupitia kuwa takatifu', 1, 2),
(17, 'The Holy Spirit has no role in our spiritual growth', 'Roho Mtakatifu haina jukumu katika ukuaji wetu wa kiroho', 0, 3),
(17, 'We become like Jesus through our own effort and willpower', 'Tunakamatia kama Yesu kupitia juhudi zetu na nguvu ya nia', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 3, Question 18
(18, 'The Holy Spirit inspired the writing of the Bible', 'Roho Mtakatifu ilieneza kuandika Biblia', 0, 1),
(18, 'The Holy Spirit helps us understand and apply Scripture', 'Roho Mtakatifu inasaidia tuelewe na kutumia Maandiko', 0, 2),
(18, 'Both A and B', 'Zote A na B', 1, 3),
(18, 'The Holy Spirit and the Bible are separate and unrelated', 'Roho Mtakatifu na Biblia hazina uhusiano', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 4, Question 19
(19, 'Poverty and lack of education', 'Umaskini na ukosefu wa elimu', 0, 1),
(19, 'Sin - breaking God''s law and rebelling against Him', 'Dhambi - kuvunja sheria ya Mungu na kuasi Mungu', 1, 2),
(19, 'Bad luck and misfortune', 'Bahati mbaya na matatizo', 0, 3),
(19, 'We don''t actually need salvation', 'Hatuhitaji kuokoa', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 4, Question 20
(20, 'Yes, if we do enough good deeds', 'Ndiyo, kama tunafanya kazi nzuri sana', 0, 1),
(20, 'Yes, if we are good enough', 'Ndiyo, kama tunavyo nzuri sana', 0, 2),
(20, 'No, salvation is a gift of grace received through faith in Jesus', 'Hapana, kuokoa ni zawadi ya neema iliyopokelewa kupitia imani katika Yesu', 1, 3),
(20, 'Maybe, it depends on how good we are', 'Labda, inategemea jinsi tunavyo nzuri', 0, 4),
-- Lesson 4, Question 21

(21, 'Turning away from sin and turning toward God', 'Kugeuka kutoka dhambi na kugeuka kwa Mungu', 1, 2),
(21, 'Confessing our sins to a priest', 'Kuungama dhambi zetu kwa kuhani', 0, 3),
(21, 'Promising never to sin again', 'Kuahidi kutokukataa tena', 0, 4),

(22, 'Just intellectual belief in facts about Jesus', 'Kuamini tu kwa akili kuhusu mambo kuhusu Yesu', 0, 1),
(22, 'Trusting and committing your life to Jesus as Lord and Savior', 'Kuamini na kujitolea maisha yako kwa Yesu kama Bwana na Mwokozi', 1, 2),
(22, 'Blind belief without any evidence', 'Kuamini bila ushahidi', 0, 3),
(22, 'Following religious rules and traditions', 'Kufuata sheria za kidini na mila', 0, 4),

(23, 'God punishes us for our sins', 'Mungu anatuhukumu kwa dhambi zetu', 0, 1),

(23, 'We become perfect and never sin again', 'Tunakamatia kamili na hatukataai tena', 0, 3),
(23, 'God ignores our sins without forgiving them', 'Mungu inapuuza dhambi zetu bila kutusamehe', 0, 4),
